name: Stuffed Zucchini #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim ends off zucchini; cut in half lengthwise; scoop out centers, leaving about 1/4 inch around skins.
2. Combine zucchini centers in a frying pan with all other ingredients except eggs and parsley. Saute for 30 minutes.
3. Place zucchini in a baking dish; stuff with rice-vegetable mix; spoon any extra mixture around the zucchini; cover with foil.
4. Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Prick holes in the foil to allow steam to escape.
6. Beat together eggs and parsley; pour over stuffed zucchini.
7. Recover with foil and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes.
